diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
         return nn.functional.softplus(x) - self.shift

 

 class DenseSchNet(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, hidden_channels=256, num_filters=256, num_interactions=6, num_gaussians=50, cutoff=10.0, max_z=100, pooling='mean'):

+    def __init__(self, hidden_channels=384, num_filters=384, num_interactions=6, num_gaussians=100, cutoff=10.0, max_z=100, pooling='mean'):

         super().__init__()

         self.hidden_channels = hidden_channels

         self.cutoff = cutoff

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -29,9 +29,9 @@
     

     test_path = os.path.join(args.data_path, 'test_3d.pt')

     dataset = DenseQM9TestDataset(test_path)

-    loader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=128, shuffle=False, num_workers=0, collate_fn=collate_fn)

+    loader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=256, shuffle=False, num_workers=0, collate_fn=collate_fn)

     

-    model = DenseSchNet(hidden_channels=256, num_filters=256, num_interactions=6, num_gaussians=50, cutoff=10.0, pooling='mean').to(device)

+    model = DenseSchNet(hidden_channels=384, num_filters=384, num_interactions=6, num_gaussians=100, cutoff=10.0, pooling='mean').to(device)

     model.load_state_dict(torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device))

     model.eval()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -34,17 +34,17 @@
     train_dataset = DenseQM9Dataset(train_path)

     val_dataset = DenseQM9Dataset(val_path)

     

-    train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=128, shuffle=True, num_workers=0, collate_fn=collate_fn)

-    val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=128, shuffle=False, num_workers=0, collate_fn=collate_fn)

+    train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=256, shuffle=True, num_workers=0, collate_fn=collate_fn)

+    val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=256, shuffle=False, num_workers=0, collate_fn=collate_fn)

     

     logging.info("Initializing model...")

-    model = DenseSchNet(hidden_channels=256, num_filters=256, num_interactions=6, num_gaussians=50, cutoff=10.0, pooling='mean').to(device)

+    model = DenseSchNet(hidden_channels=384, num_filters=384, num_interactions=6, num_gaussians=100, cutoff=10.0, pooling='mean').to(device)

     

     optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=1e-3)

-    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.ReduceLROnPlateau(optimizer, mode='min', factor=0.5, patience=3, min_lr=1e-6)

+    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.ReduceLROnPlateau(optimizer, mode='min', factor=0.5, patience=4, min_lr=1e-6)

     criterion = nn.L1Loss()

     

-    epochs = 40

+    epochs = 80

     

     rab_iter = os.environ.get('RAB_ITERATION', '0')

     os.makedirs(f'logs/iter_{rab_iter}', exist_ok=True)
